ksa_text: Conduct comprehensive AI risk assessments to identify and document technical, organizational, and mission-level risks, including threat identification, vulnerability analysis, and risk prioritization.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

ddat.top_element_label: Applying statistical and analytical tools and techniques

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of intelligence data gathering policies and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
